rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §29.192 addresses student immunity from liability in career and technology programs—unrelated subject matter with no intersection.
quote: Sec. 29.192. IMMUNITY FROM LIABILITY. A student who participates in a career and technology program approved by a school district or an open-enrollment charter school is entitled to immunity in the same manner provided under Section 22.053 as a volunteer who is serving as a direct service volunteer of a district or school.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
